description: 1. 100% cottonLookout for the war theme printed with varied hues of blue on navy.Cool, casual and comfy, t-shirts are perhaps the best thing invented in clothing. Slipping into a t-shirt and getting started is always a breeze. It's the perennial all-occasion outfit that remains a favourite with one and all. Parties, get-togethers, Friday dressing or simply a walk in the park, t-shirts are an ideal Fit for any occasion. The appeal of T-shirts only gets more as they are available in lots of colours, various fits and sizes. So all it takes  is the desire to wear a t-shirt and one would be spoilt for choice pretty soon. Stuff up the wardrobe or stack up your room with T-shirts that suit your style and taste. Go on and join the ever growing fan club for T-shirts. Guys, gals, uncles, aunts, grandpas, grandmas....everyone are invited. Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in T-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
